name: @kilocode/openclaw-security-advisor
description: Security analysis plugin for OpenClaw instances, powered by KiloClaw
//: private: true is intentional. We mirror @kilocode/cli's publish strategy: the source package.json is marked private as a safety net against accidental `npm publish`, and a future build+publish script (modeled on packages/opencode/script/publish.ts) will write a cleaned dist/package.json WITHOUT this flag and publish from there. Do NOT remove this without also adding the build+publish pipeline.
